children.heading: Administrator
children.label: 1 Administrator
children.text: The term “Administrator” means the Administrator of the Environmental Protection Agency.

children.heading: Advisory Board
children.label: 2 Advisory Board
children.text: The term “Advisory Board” means the Land Between the Lakes Advisory Board established under section 460–22 of this title.lll

children.heading: Chairman
children.label: 3 Chairman
children.text: The term “Chairman” means the Chairman of the Board of Directors of the Tennessee Valley Authority.

children.heading: Eligible employee
children.label: 4 Eligible employee
children.text: The term “eligible employee” means a person that was, on the date of transfer pursuant to section 460–41 of this title, a full-time or part-time annual employee of the Tennessee Valley Authority at the Recreation Area.lll

children.heading: In general
children.label: A In general
children.text: The term “environmental law” means all applicable Federal, State, and local laws (including regulations) and requirements related to protection of human health, natural and cultural resources, or the environment.

children.label: i
children.text: the Comprehensive Environmental Response, Compensation, and Liability Act of 1980 ( et seq.);42 U.S.C. 9601

children.label: ii
children.text: the Solid Waste Disposal Act ( et seq.);42 U.S.C. 6901

children.label: iii
children.text: the Federal Water Pollution Control Act ( et seq.);33 U.S.C. 1251

children.label: iv
children.text: the Clean Air Act ( et seq.);42 U.S.C. 7401

children.label: v
children.text: the Federal Insecticide, Fungicide, and Rodenticide Act ( et seq.);7 U.S.C. 136

children.label: vi
children.text: the Toxic Substances Control Act ( et seq.);15 U.S.C. 2601

children.label: vii
children.text: the Safe Drinking Water Act ( et seq.);42 U.S.C. 300f

children.label: viii
children.text: the National Environmental Policy Act of 1969 ( et seq.); and42 U.S.C. 4321

children.label: ix
children.text: the Endangered Species Act of 1973 ( et seq.).16 U.S.C. 1531

children.heading: Forest highway
children.label: 6 Forest highway
children.text: The term “forest highway” has the meaning given the term in .section 101(a) of title 231See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Governmental unit
children.label: 7 Governmental unit
children.text: The term “governmental unit” means an agency of the Federal Government or a State or local government, local governmental unit, public or municipal corporation, or unit of a State university system.

children.heading: Hazardous substance
children.label: 8 Hazardous substance
children.text: The term “hazardous substance” has the meaning given the term in section 101 of the Comprehensive Environmental Response, Compensation, and Liability Act of 1980 ().42 U.S.C. 9601

children.heading: Person
children.label: 9 Person
children.text: The term “person” has the meaning given the term in section 101 of the Comprehensive Environmental Response, Compensation, and Liability Act of 1980 ().42 U.S.C. 9601

children.heading: Pollutant or contaminant
children.label: 10 Pollutant or contaminant
children.text: The term “pollutant or contaminant” has the meaning given the term in section 101 of the Comprehensive Environmental Response, Compensation, and Liability Act of 1980 ().42 U.S.C. 9601

children.label: A
children.text: a former resident of the area within the Recreation Area or the spouse of a former resident of that area; or

children.label: B
children.text: a widow, widower, or lineal descendant of an individual buried in a cemetery located in the Recreation Area.

children.heading: Recreation Area
children.label: 12 Recreation Area
children.text: The term “Recreation Area” means the Land Between the Lakes National Recreation Area.

children.heading: Release
children.label: 13 Release
children.text: The term “release” has the meaning given the term in section 101 of the Comprehensive Environmental Response, Compensation, and Liability Act of 1980 ().42 U.S.C. 9601

children.heading: Response action
children.label: 14 Response action
children.text: The term “response action” has the meaning given the term in section 101 of the Comprehensive Environmental Response, Compensation, and Liability Act of 1980 ().42 U.S.C. 9601

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 15 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of Agriculture.

children.heading: State
children.label: 16 State
children.text: The term “State” means the State of Kentucky and the State of Tennessee.
